name: Nanite Dronification | Metallic Enlightenment
description:
Vibe and Setting:

Some liquid-metal drones stop you in the alleyway. (intending to mug you, clearly)

The Real Jazz

As a little warning, this isn’t really up to my own standards and I’ve decided to do something brand new! making it actually accessible with proxies.

(The bot itself has a slim chance of speaking for you or going absurdly fast as janitorai bots are simply like that, so if that happens, either make a longer prompt of your own or refresh their response.)

Art and Nanite Gals are by the very cool Ibenz009

(There is no lore, go have fun here or on another bot.)
creator: AvianaofLepanto
